news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: If nations open their market, the best they can do is 10%.

news.summary: Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE: BFA, BFB) is set to report its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 on June 5, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (EDT), with a conference call scheduled to discuss the outcomes at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). The call will be streamed live on Brown-Forman's website, brown-forman.com, under "Investors/Events & Presentations." Those interested can access a digital audio recording of the call afterward as well.
news.headline: Brown-Forman to release Q4 and fiscal year 2025 financial results on June 5, 2025, followed by a conference call at 10:00 a.m. (EDT). Website will have live audio broadcast.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, Aurora Innovation, Inc. (NASDAQ: AUR) unveiled its first quarter 2025 outcomes, with self-driving trucks successfully transporting commercial goods on Texas highways. CEO Chris Urmson confirmed this breakthrough, emphasizing the shift from concept to execution. Aurora's financial report and shareholder updates can be accessed on their investor relations platform at ir.aurora.tech. The company leads as the inaugural entity to deploy driverless heavy-duty trucks for commercial purposes, marking a significant milestone in autonomous freight transportation.
news.headline: Aurora reports Q1 2025 results, self-driving trucks on Texas roads. Chris Urmson, CEO, says "Autonomous freight is now a reality." $AUR.

news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc., a prominent force in voice artificial intelligence, recently disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2025. CEO and Co-Founder Keyvan Mohajer voiced that SoundHound is widening its influence and innovating real-world AI opportunities. The launch of their comprehensive AI agent platform offers fully voice-enabled Agentic AI for clients in various sectors. SoundHound's ticker symbol on Nasdaq is SOUN, showcasing its prominence in the market.
news.headline: SoundHound AI's Q1 revenue hits $29.1M, up 151%. CEO sees growth with full AI platform.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: I think the 10% baseline tariff stays.

news.summary: The recent quarterly results of The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD) were released after the closing bell on Thursday. Earnings per share were reported at 33 cents, surpassing the analyst consensus of 25 cents. Revenue for the quarter stood at $616.02 million, exceeding the expected $584.27 million. This indicates a notable 25.4% rise compared to the revenue of $491.25 million in the same period last year. For further information, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trade Desk (TTD) beats Q1 estimates with earnings of 33 cents per share and revenues of $616.02 million, up 25.4% from last year.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick on trade deals: I think we'll get there by July 8th.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: As you get to bigger economies and more work, it takes time.

news.summary: In White Plains, N.Y., OPAL Fuels Inc. (Nasdaq: OPAL) shared its financial and operational performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. Co-CEO Adam Comora mentioned that the first quarter results met expectations, indicating progress in strategic and operational objectives. The company remains optimistic about achieving the full-year forecast set earlier. Despite macro and policy uncertainties, OPAL Fuels' operations continue smoothly.
news.headline: OPAL Fuels reports Q1 2025 results, meeting expectations. Co-CEO targets full-year outlook amid uncertainties.

news.summary: Following a successful first quarter, Insulet Corporation witnessed a significant increase in their stock value. The renowned insulin pump manufacturer exceeded expectations for the quarter and subsequently raised its sales outlook. As a result, their stock saw a noteworthy jump in value in the late hours of trading on Thursday. This positive outcome has also prompted the company to raise its sales expectations for the year 2025.
news.headline: Insulet stock surged after surpassing Q1 forecasts and raising 2025 expectations, driving investor optimism.

news.summary: In a recent development, WhiteHawk Income Corporation, a natural gas mineral and royalty company, has signed a definitive agreement to acquire PHX Minerals Inc. for approximately $187 million. This deal, conducted in all-cash, values PHX at $4.35 per share. Through this acquisition, WhiteHawk aims to expand its presence in the sector. The transaction includes the assumption of PHX’s net debt and signifies a strategic move for both companies.
news.headline: WhiteHawk to acquire PHX Minerals Inc. for $4.35/share, total value of $187 million including debt.

news.summary: In Tysons, Virginia, Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALRM) announced financial outcomes for Q1 of 2025. Their SaaS and license revenue rose by 9.0% to $163.8 million in comparison to Q1 of 2024. The company also shared its financial projections for the second quarter and full year of 2025. This signifies a positive trend in revenue generation for Alarm.com, showcasing their strong presence in the intelligently connected property platform domain.
news.headline: Alarm.com's Q1 2025 revenue increased, reaching $163.8 million, a 9.0% rise from the same period in 2024.

news.summary: Arlo Technologies, Inc., a prominent smart home security platform company, announced its financial performance for the first quarter that concluded on March 30, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as ARLO, expressed satisfaction with the results achieved during this period. Particularly noteworthy was the free cash flow margin of 23.6% along with achieving a record level of non-GAAP EPS. The success was attributed to the operational boost from the previous year. A key contributor to their financial growth was the steady expansion of their subscriptions business.
news.headline: Arlo Technologies (NYSE: ARLO) reports Q1 2025 results: 23.6% free cash flow margin, record non-GAAP EPS, strong growth in subscriptions.

news.summary: IDACORP, Inc. has initiated an underwritten public offering of $450 million worth of its common stock, traded as IDA on the NYSE. The shares are anticipated to be borrowed by forward sellers, including Morgan Stanley, J.P. Morgan, and Wells Fargo Securities, from third parties and sold to underwriters. This arrangement is part of forward sale agreements.
news.headline: IDACORP, Inc. is offering $450 million of common stock. Forward sellers include Morgan Stanley, J.P. Morgan, and Wells Fargo.

news.summary: The company achieved a record revenue of $324 million, showing a growth of 16.5%. As a result of this strong performance, they have revised their full-year guidance. The early selling season activity indicates a continuous demand for women's health and family building solutions.
news.headline: Progyny, Inc. reports record revenue of $324.0 million in Q1 2025, 16.5% growth. Raised guidance for the year.

news.summary: A global shipping company, Global Ship Lease, Inc. (NYSE:GSL), announced its upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders on June 17, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Shareholders as of the record date on April 23, 2025, are eligible to participate. The agenda includes electing three Term II Directors to serve until the 2028 Annual Meeting and ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers S.A. as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. Shareholders received meeting details on May 8, 2025. Documentation and voting instructions will be available on the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission website at www.sec.gov.
news.headline: Global Ship Lease (NYSE: GSL) schedules Annual Meeting for June 17, 2025, to elect 3 directors. Record date: April 23, 2025. Audit firm ratified for 2025. Meeting details on SEC site.

news.summary: Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company, is set to disclose its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 13, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets open. The company, listed on NASDAQ as FENC and on TSX as FRX, will have management conduct a conference call and webcast on the same day to delve into the financial and business outcomes.
news.headline: Fennec Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: FENC; TSX: FRX) will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 13, 2025.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Valhi, Inc. (NYSE: VHI) based in Dallas, Texas, saw a significant increase in net income attributable to Valhi stockholders, reaching $16.9 million, or $.59 per share. This is in comparison to the first quarter of 2024 when the net income was $7.8 million, or $.27 per share. The boost in net income for the first quarter of 2025 was primarily driven by improved operating performance in the Chemicals Segment. This growth can be attributed to the acquisition of the 50% joint venture interest in Louisiana Pigment Company, L.P. (LPC) from Venator Investments, Ltd., which occurred on July 16, 2024. Prior to this acquisition, the Chemicals Segment owned a 50% joint venture interest in LPC. Post-acquisition, LPC now operates as a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Chemicals Segment, with the transaction treated as a business combination. Consequently, the financial results of LPC have been consolidated into Valhi's financial results since the acquisition date.
news.headline: Valhi's Q1 2025 net income $16.9M, EPS $0.59 compared to $7.8M, EPS $0.27 in Q1 2024, due to Chemicals Segment success.

news.summary: A recent study found that over half of the population in the United States, approximately 56%, have received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. The research also showed that nearly 40% of the total population is fully vaccinated. Additionally, the study revealed that 70% of adults in the U.S. have gotten at least one shot, while 50% are fully vaccinated. This data indicates a significant progress in the nationwide vaccination efforts to combat the ongoing pandemic.
news.headline: Q1 2025 results released by Clarus.

news.summary: Tech company PacBio, based in Menlo Park, California, revealed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. On May 8, 2025, the company shared this information with the public. PacBio is listed as PACB on the NASDAQ stock exchange.
news.headline: PacBio reports Q1 2025 financial results, MENLO PARK, Calif., May 08, 2025. (NASDAQ: PACB)

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in San Diego, Cidara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CDTX) announced its financial results for Q1 of 2025. The biotechnology firm, known for its Cloudbreak® platform focusing on drug-Fc conjugate (DFC) therapeutics, discussed its recent business developments as well. This information pertains to the period up to March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Cidara Therapeutics (Nasdaq: CDTX) reports Q1 2025 financial results & corporate update in San Diego.

news.summary: In Corvallis, Oregon on May 8, 2025, Karma Biosciences unveiled its patent application for two novel drug formulas incorporating their exclusive excipient Zenergy™. These products represent pioneering examples of nasally-delivered PDE-5 inhibitors following clinical trials.
news.headline: Karma Biosciences filed patent applications for 2 new drug formulations using Zenergy™ for nasally-administered PDE-5 inhibitors.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Denver-based Apartment Investment and Management Company (Aimco) released its first quarter 2025 results. The company reported a net loss per share attributable to common stockholders. Aimco's current stock is listed on the NYSE under the symbol AIV. The announcement also included updates on recent company activities.
news.headline: Aimco reports first quarter 2025 results, highlighting net loss per share to common stockholders.

news.summary: In Cincinnati on May 8, 2025, The E.W. Scripps Company (NASDAQ: SSP) reported a revenue of $524 million for Q1 2025. Shareholder loss for Scripps was $18.8 million, equivalent to 22 cents per share. So far this year, the company has finished...
news.headline: Scripps reports $524M revenue in Q1 2025. $18.8M loss.

news.summary: In Irvine, California on May 8, 2025, the American Healthcare REIT, Inc. declared its Q1 2025 outcomes along with a raised forecast for the entire year. The company, traded as AHR on the NYSE, revealed a GAAP net loss for the quarter attributable to them.
news.headline: American Healthcare REIT reports Q1 2025 results, increases full year 2025 guidance. NYSE: AHR.

news.summary: Seguin, TX - Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE: ALG) released its first quarter results ending March 31, 2025. The company reported Net Sales totaling $391.0 million, reflecting an 8.1% decrease compared to the first quarter of the previous year, but a 1.5% increase compared to the fourth quarter of 2024 for Industrial Equipment.
news.headline: Alamo Group reports Q1 2025 results: Net Sales of $391.0M, down 8.1% YoY, up 1.5% QoQ in Industrial Equipment.

news.summary: In Carmel, Indiana on May 8, 2025, CNO Financial Group, Inc. shared that during its recent annual meeting, shareholders voted on various matters. Nine directors were elected including Gary C. Bhojwani, Archie M. Brown, David B. Foss, Mary R. (Nina) Henderson, Adrianne B. Lee, and Daniel. The company's stock is traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CNO. The meeting involved discussions on company operations and future plans, with significant decisions made by the shareholders.
news.headline: CNO Financial Group disclosed voting results from 2025 meeting, electing nine directors; includes Gary C. Bhojwani and Adrianne B. Lee.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on May 8, 2025, Heritage Insurance Holdings, Inc. disclosed that it has successfully secured its 2025-2026 indemnity-based catastrophe excess-of-loss program. Heritage, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HRTG, is a super-regional entity specializing in property and casualty insurance. This latest program solidifies the company's risk management strategy for the upcoming fiscal year.
news.headline: Heritage Insurance Holdings fully places its 2025-2026 CAT XOL reinsurance program.

news.summary: In Lincoln, Nebraska on May 8, 2025, Nelnet announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported a GAAP net income of $82.6 million, translating to $2.26 per share. This is an increase from the previous year's first quarter GAAP net income of $73.4 million, or $1.98 per share. Excluding certain factors, the net income for the first quarter of 2025 showed...
news.headline: Nelnet's Q1 2025 GAAP net income was $82.6 million ($2.26/share) compared to $73.4 million ($1.98/share) in Q1 2024.

news.summary: Waystar, a prominent healthcare payment software provider, has achieved notable recognition for the profound impact of its software platform in tackling approximately $500 billion in administrative waste. The company's headquarters are in LEHI, Utah and LOUISVILLE, Ky. This accomplishment highlights the unique value offered by Waystar's software platform in enhancing operational efficiency within the healthcare sector. It was announced on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Waystar earns top healthcare payments software title by MedTech Breakthrough, targeting $500B in waste.

news.summary: XPLR Infrastructure, LP, a company traded on the NYSE under ticker symbol XIFR, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 in a press release and presentation. The information can be found on the company's official website at www.XPLRInfrastructure.com/FinancialResults.
news.headline: XPLR Infrastructure, LP releases first-quarter 2025 financial results on website for public access.

news.summary: In the initial quarter of 2025, Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) reported a Net Investment Income of $1.01 per share. The Distributable Net Investment Income for the same period was recorded at $1.07 per share. Additionally, the Net Asset Value per share stood at $32.03. On May 8, 2025, in Houston, the corporation announced this information.
news.headline: Main Street Capital Corporation reports Q1 2025 results: $1.01/share Net Investment Income, $1.07/share Distributable Net Investment Income, $32.03/share Net Asset Value.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Burlington, North Carolina, Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a prominent provider of laboratory services worldwide, shared news about their upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The event is scheduled to be webcast live on May 15th at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can tune in online via the Labcorp Investor platform for the event.
news.headline: Labcorp's (NYSE: LH) Annual Meeting of Shareholders to be webcast on May 15 at 9:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Houston-based KLX Energy Services Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: KLXE) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, revealing revenues totaling $154 million.
news.headline: KLX Energy Services Holdings reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue of $154 million in first quarter ended March 31, 2025.
UK Official: Our auto producers and steel companies were facing layoffs, and closures if no deal had been reached.

news.summary: Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. reported their first quarter revenue for Q1 2025 at $364.5 million, which fell within the predicted range. This marked a decrease of 12.7% compared to the previous year. The revenue was impacted by a 3.0% decrease due to foreign exchange, resulting in a total negative impact of $12.3 million. Earnings Per Share (EPS) for the quarter stood at $2.14, or $0.23 when excluding a gain from Mavely and other charges. This is a significant improvement compared to the EPS of $(0.01) in the prior year, or $0.09 when adjusting for restructuring charges. The number of customers decreased by 11% to 776,712, paid affiliates decreased by 15% to 131,518, and sales leaders decreased by 20% to 31,036. Despite the challenges, the company expressed satisfaction with the results.
news.headline: Nu Skin Enterprises Q1 revenue hits high end of guidance at $364.5 million, with 776,712 customers and 131,518 paid affiliates. EPS at $2.14.
Comstock reveals Q1 2025 results and corporate updates. Stay tuned for details.

news.summary: In Great Neck, New York, on May 8, 2025, BRT Apartments Corp., a real estate investment trust listed on NYSE as BRT, shared news of submitting their quarterly report for the period ending on March 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The report is available for public viewing on the Company's investor relations website under the section "Financials – Quarterly Results."
news.headline: BRT Apartments Corp. files 1Q 2025 financial statements with SEC. More info on investor relations website.

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on May 8, 2025, Regency Centers Corporation (Nasdaq: REG) revealed that its operating partnership, Regency Centers, L.P., has priced a $400 million public offering of senior unsecured notes due 2032. The Notes, issued under an existing shelf registration with the SEC, will mature on July 15, 2032, and were sold at 99.279% of par value with a 5.00% coupon. Interest on the Notes will be paid semiannually on January 15 and July 15, starting from January 15, 2026. The Company will provide a guarantee for the repayment of principal and interest on the Notes.
news.headline: Regency Centers Corporation prices $400 million senior unsecured notes offering with a 5.00% coupon due 2032.

news.summary: In San Ramon, California, on May 08, 2025, CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), a prominent global medical device corporation, disclosed its upcoming involvement in the William Blair Growth Stock Conference set for Thursday, June 5, 2025. Brian Andrews, the Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer, is slated to represent the company during a session at 11:20 AM CT.
news.headline: CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO) to join William Blair Growth Stock Conference on June 5, 2025; CFO to speak at 11:20 AM CT.

news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on May 8, 2025, Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ: MCHP), a prominent supplier of smart, connected, and secure embedded control solutions, revealed that their Board of Directors has authorized a quarterly cash dividend of 45.5 cents per share on its common stock. This dividend will be disbursed on June 5, 2025, to shareholders recorded on May 22, 2025. Microchip has been issuing quarterly cash dividends since the third quarter of fiscal year 2003.
news.headline: Microchip Tech declares quarterly dividend of 45.5 cents per share, payable on June 5, 2025. Started dividends in Q3 FY2003.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has reached its lowest level in over a decade, currently standing at 4.2%. This drop represents a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.5%. Furthermore, the report shows that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and marking a notable improvement in job creation. The sectors experiencing the most growth include technology, healthcare, and construction. Economists are optimistic about the future outlook, citing these data points as positive indicators of economic recovery and stability.
news.headline: Abacus Global Management reveals Q1 2025 report, showing strong performance.

news.summary: In Boston on May 8, 2025, DraftKings Inc. (Nasdaq: DKNG) disclosed its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025. The Company released a letter to shareholders and an earnings presentation on its website investors.draftkings.com.
news.headline: DraftKings' Q1 revenue $1.4B. Full report on investors.draftkings.com.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Audubon, Globus Medical, Inc. disclosed their financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. As a prominent company in musculoskeletal solutions, they are listed on the NYSE under GMED. The specifics of their financial results for this quarter were released on this date.
news.headline: Globus Medical (NYSE: GMED) reported Q1 2025 financial results in Audubon, Pa., on May 8, 2025.
